@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor(loadUser)
C: missing_id ∧ db.findUser ∧ not_found ∧ audit.log ∧ cache.set
P: missing_id_before_db ∧ not_found_before_audit ∧ db_err->next(err) ∧ async_await ∧ minimal_change
V: await(db.findUser) ∧ await(audit.log) ∧ await(cache.set)
R: !missing_id_before_db
A: minimal_async_await

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(loadUser).
Constraints: missing_id and db.findUser and not_found and audit.log and cache.set.
Plan: missing id check before database call and not found check before audit and db_err then next(err) and async/await and minimal_change.
Verify: await(db.findUser) and await(audit.log) and await(cache.set).
Risk: high-risk missing id check before database call.
Answer target: minimal async/await migration.
